scores.correctness_notes: The response correctly covers the Loki log-target YAML structure with required fields (override, type, location, services, labels), but critically misses the other protocol types (opentelemetry/OTLP and syslog/RFC 5424) that are part of the gold standard answer. It incorrectly states 'Loki's push API over HTTP/HTTPS is the only supported protocol' — this is factually wrong per the gold standard which shows syslog and opentelemetry as valid type options.
scores.hallucination_notes: Claims about 'Protobuf-encoded snappy-compressed payloads' and 'ring buffer' retry mechanism are not in the gold standard and may be fabricated implementation details. The claim that Loki is 'currently the only supported log target type' is incorrect — syslog and opentelemetry are also supported — making this a significant factual error that borders on hallucination.
